title: Polish Chicken Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with chicken, vegetables, and polish sausage. Perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: 1. In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat some oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the chopped onion, carrot, and celery and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Add the polish sausage and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
5. Add the bouillon, water (if using), and chopped sweet potato to the pot.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
7. Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or dill, if desired.
